title: History and Psychology Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education Teaching License with History and Psychology Endorsements or Social Studies Composite EndorsementThe salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
